base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_1_entrance_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 castlevania. Level 1 Entrance — iconic castle-approach stage. Opens with drawbridge+courtyard+moat crossing (Zombies), enters castle foyer (Black Leopards + Vampire Bats), climbs to Phantom Bat boss-room. 3 sub-stages end-to-end. ~3600 px wide. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 1 Entrance — iconic castle-approach stage. Opens with drawbridge+courtyard+moat crossing (Zombies), enters castle foyer (Black Leopards + Vampire Bats), climbs to Phantom Bat boss-room. 3 sub-stages end-to-end. ~3600 px wide
